description: Fast HTML web scraper without browser overhead. Ideal for static websites. | 快速 HTML 网页爬虫，无需浏览器，适合静态网站。

properties.title: 起始 URL | Start URLs
properties.name: startUrls
properties.description: URLs to start crawling from | 开始爬取的 URL 列表

properties.title: 链接选择器 | Link Selector
properties.name: linkSelector
properties.description: CSS selector for finding links. Leave empty to disable. | 用于发现链接的 CSS 选择器，留空禁用

properties.title: 排除 URL 模式 | Exclude URL Patterns
properties.name: excludePatterns
properties.description: URL patterns to skip (e.g., /login, /admin). | 要跳过的 URL 模式

properties.title: 最大爬取深度 | Max Depth
properties.name: maxCrawlingDepth
properties.description: Maximum crawl depth (0 = start page only). | 最大爬取深度（0 = 仅起始页）

properties.title: 最大页面数 | Max Pages
properties.name: maxPagesPerCrawl
properties.description: Maximum pages to crawl (0 = unlimited). | 最大爬取页面数（0 = 不限制）

properties.title: 最大并发数 | Concurrency
properties.name: maxConcurrency
properties.description: Concurrent requests. Higher = faster but more load. | 并发请求数，越高越快但负载越大

properties.title: 请求超时(秒) | Timeout (secs)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: HTTP request timeout. | HTTP 请求超时时间

properties.title: 重试次数 | Retries
properties.name: maxRequestRetries
properties.description: Retries for failed requests. | 失败请求重试次数

properties.title: 请求延迟(ms) | Delay (ms)
properties.name: requestDelayMs
properties.description: Delay between requests. Prevents rate limiting. | 请求间隔，防止被限流

properties.title: 跨域爬取 | Cross-Domain
properties.name: crossDomain
properties.description: Allow crawling other domains. | 允许爬取其他域名

properties.title: 调试日志 | Debug Log
properties.name: debugLog
properties.description: Enable detailed logging. | 启用详细日志
